sentence_reviews.text: Graph compilers and inference runtimes transform model programs through tracing, lowering, scheduling, operator fusion, code generation, and device-specific execution.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Reviewed as synthesis across cited source pointers and, where applicable, the canonical atlas graph context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Former ambiguity resolved by narrowing the audit interpretation to synthesis support rather than requiring exact-source wording.

sentence_reviews.text: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Programming languages, compilers & type systems, CUDA, ROCm, Triton & custom kernels.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: In this atlas graph, Graph compilers, runtimes & operator fusion is modeled as depending on Programming languages, compilers & type systems, CUDA, ROCm, Triton & custom kernels and feeding downstream nodes such as Model servers & inference runtimes, Quantized inference & compressed deployment, Structured-decoding runtimes.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: data/atlas.json canonical node and dependency graph; generated from node dependencies and downstream consumers.
